$comment: Fan-out: run edit_file once per TODO file from the scaffold worklist, filling the bodies. Each sub-run inherits the active workspace; the foreach succeeds only if every file builds.
input: {{ item }} implement the code marked with // TODO comments, using the pseudocode / uses / step lines in those comments. Replace any return {}; stub and any TODO in main() with real working C++. Keep every existing signature, the override keyword, inheritance, fields, constructors and #include lines; add any includes you need.
